title.en: So, they don't want to take risks either.

content.en:
"Taisu Gong Miaoan asked us to help?"

For too long, the elders waited until the Dao Realm was not excited, but frowned one by one.

At this time, one of the elders asked, "Gu Master, what do you need to help with, and how dangerous is it?" If we don't know, we won't go." "

The other elders also had this attitude, after all, they had reached the Supreme Dao realm, and they were living a very comfortable life in the True River Valley, plus the True River Valley was blessed by the Taisu Palace, and there had been no problems for a long time.

So, they don't want to take risks either.

Of course, if they can help, they will still help, after all, the True River Valley can live here with such a weak force, and Miao An is of great help.

Then.

The Lord of the True River Valley said: "You should know about the ninth strange land of the Infinite Domain-Xuanlin Mountain Realm, this Xuanlin Mountain Realm only allows creatures below the triple to the Dao realm to enter, and even if it is a double to the Dao realm, the strength will be greatly suppressed. Therefore, in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, the combination of multiple Tier 1 Supreme Dao Realms was enough to deal with the Tier 2 Realm Dao Realm. Taisu Palace is ready to let a group of Dao Realm geniuses enter the Xuanlin Mountain Realm and find some materials that Taisu Palace wants, whoever finds more will get better results, and they will also obtain the sequence of Taisu Palace's vigorous cultivation. "

"Miao'an is under a lot of competitive pressure now, and Taisu Palace does not allow non-subordinate forces to participate, and our True River Valley is under the command of Taisu Palace, so we can participate. At present, Miao An has recruited more than thirty Dao Realms, but they are still not enough, so I hope you can all help with me. "

Hearing the words of the True River Valley Lord, many of the elders frowned even tighter.

"Xuanlin Mountain Realm, this is a bit dangerous, isn't it?" said Elder Taijiu.

The other elders also responded to the same path:

"The Xuanlin Mountain Realm is the ninth strange land, there are a lot of resources in it, but it is also very dangerous, once you go to the Dao realm, there is a great possibility of falling!"

"We want to help, but we don't want to gamble with our lives!"

"True River Valley Lord, we are only a one-fold Dao realm, not a two-fold Dao realm!"

"I don't really want to go!"

None of the elders were willing, and the True River Valley Lord's face was very ugly.

If the elders of the Supreme Dao Realm in the True River Valley were unwilling to go, after Miao An found out, he was afraid that he would be very dissatisfied with the True River Valley.

Although his son Zhenyang River Miao'an is a Taoist couple, only Zhenyang has a relationship with her, Miao'an doesn't care about the real river valley, if the real river valley doesn't help her in any way, maybe she will give up protecting the real river valley!

In these long years, the True River Valley has also gained a lot of benefits by relying on the relationship of Taisu Palace, if this relationship is lost, the True River Valley will not have a good time in the future!

"Elders, Miao An promised that once the resources are obtained in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, they will be distributed according to the level of effort. In addition, each Supreme Dao Realm can obtain a Flowing Gold Secret Elixir from Taisu Palace. "

As soon as they heard the secret elixir of flowing gold, many elders danced with their eyebrows, and their hearts were all moved.

The Flowing Gold Secret Elixir is not an ordinary thing, it is a secret medicine that helps the first to the Dao Realm to impact the second to the Dao Realm, and there is no such secret medicine in the True River Valley at all.

According to the data, there is a 30% chance of helping a strong person who has reached the peak of the Dao Realm to impact to the Dao Realm, but there is only one chance to impact, if it fails, it will produce some kind of resistance in the body, and it will be useless to take the Flowing Gold Secret Elixir again.

In the past, the secret medicine of flowing gold rarely flowed out of the Taisu Palace, and no matter how much there was a lot of Dao coins, it was impossible to buy a secret medicine of flowing gold.

If you get a Flowing Gold Secret Elixir and get some resources from the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, you will not be without hope of becoming a Triple Dao Realm in the future.

Behind these elders is not only themselves, but also a huge family, and only when they are strong can they protect their own family to a higher level.

So, a little bit of risk is worth it.

"Valley Lord, I'm willing to help!" said Elder Taijiu first.

The other elders also expressed their willingness to go to the Xuanlin Mountain Realm.

Ye Tian naturally indicated that he wanted to go, maybe he could take this opportunity to get some more resources, so as to help his true body copy body impact to the Supreme Dao Realm.

The True Body Replicating Body is now the ninth balance realm, because the foundation is too strong, it is very difficult to break through in the future, and the resources spent are unimaginable, and there are not so many resources for him to cultivate to the first level of Dao realm.

So, he had to gather a lot of resources.

If the real body copy body breaks through to the First Supreme Dao Realm, then the strength will be extremely terrifying, and it may even be comparable to the combat power of the Triple Supreme Dao Realm or even the Quadruple Supreme Dao Realm!

Seeing that all the elders were willing to help, the True River Valley Lord secretly sneered: "This group of guys is still willing to take risks when they see benefits!"

Still, he can understand.

If it weren't for the fact that the person he wanted to help was his son's Taoist companion, he wouldn't have been so concerned.

"Elders prepare well, bring all the life-saving items, and don't publicize this matter. After all, all the True River Valley to the Dao Realm were dispatched, and if it was spread out, it would be a little dangerous. It would not be good if a supreme Dao realm powerhouse came to attack the True River Valley and rob the True River Valley resources. So, external propaganda, we are all in retreat. As long as it's not long, there's no problem. The Lord of the True River Valley admonished.

"Yes!"

Many elders answered one by one.

......

Taisu Palace.

Xuanmiao Palace.

Miao An is instructing her subordinates to prepare for the affairs of the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, she is one of the heirs of the palace master of the Xuanlin Palace, and her status in the Taisu Palace is still good, but because the cultivation time is not very long, her cultivation is still at the peak of the double to the Dao realm.

This time, Taisu Palace is ready to vigorously cultivate a group of Supreme Dao Realm geniuses, the quota is only thirty-six, and the cultivation is only limited to the Triple Dao Realm and the Twofold Dao Realm, of which the Twofold Dao Realm is only six.

In other words, she needed to compete with other Dual Supreme Dao Realm geniuses for these six places.

Even she wasn't much sure, but she had to give it her all.

Wow!

A young man in a cyan uniform appeared and walked to Miao An's side.

"Miao An, my father has sent news that the elders of the Supreme Dao Realm in the entire True River Valley will come to help, and my father will also come to help. "

This young man is the son of the Lord of the True River Valley, True Yang.

True Yang's talent is also very good, relying on Miao'an's help, now his cultivation has also reached the late stage of the Triple Dao Realm, and his strength is slightly weaker than Miao'an, but the future potential is still okay, and it is definitely no problem to become a Triple Dao Realm.
